description: Proposition 67 was a 2016 California ballot measure that asked voters to uphold or overturn the state's existing plastic bag ban legislation (SB 270). It represented a direct confrontation between environmental groups and the plastic manufacturing lobby.

key_events.description: American Progressive Bag Alliance spends millions on 'No' campaign.
Opposition messaging highlights grocery bag costs to low-income families.
Major California newspapers endorse the 'Yes' vote.
Election night results confirm the retention of the state ban.

calibration_notes: Excellent for studying the influence of high-budget industry lobbying against environmental ballot initiatives.
